metadata.description: Fort Abode Utility Central's bundled Claude Code plugin marketplace. Distributes the Weekly Rhythm Engine and other Kam Studios skills via the Fort Abode Mac app.

plugins.name: weekly-rhythm-engine
plugins.description: The strategic engine for Kam's week — work and personal life in one unified rhythm. Runs on Fridays to plan the full coming week, and on-demand anytime something changes. Synthesizes Google Calendar, Apple Reminders, and Gmail into a structured weekly brief shaped by day types, goals, errands, and milestone awareness.
